summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AURA-V drone swarm command dashboard. All backend APIs and frontend components are fully functional. EW attack simulation, AI copilot recommendations, and swarm management features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend health check endpoint returns proper status
Backend swarm state endpoint returns 5 drones with complete telemetry
Backend EW attack simulation triggers GPS loss on D-1
Backend copilot recommendation generates tactical response with mock LLM
Backend swarm reset functionality works correctly
Frontend loads AURA-V dashboard with dark tactical theme
Frontend displays 5 drones in telemetry panel with all data
Frontend swarm status panel shows correct drone counts and mission info
Frontend EW attack simulation button triggers attack and shows D-1 as CRITICAL
Frontend AI copilot recommendation card appears with recovery steps
Frontend approve button in copilot card is clickable and functional
Frontend alerts panel shows EW attack and GPS lost alerts
Frontend mission timeline displays events correctly
Frontend Leaflet map displays with dark tactical tiles and drone markers
Frontend reset functionality restores swarm to nominal state

success_percentage.backend: 100% - All 7 API endpoints tested and working
success_percentage.frontend: 100% - All UI components and integrations functional
